content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach operates from a clear VIEW state throughout. Pace is notably slow — single questions, lots of silence held, no stacking. When the client offers the bait of framework comparison in turn 1 ('does your approach do something different'), the coach doesn't take it, doesn't defend or contrast — instead drops to the smile, which is genuine wonder for what's actually in front of them. Turn 12 ('I'm not pointing at anything') is a beautiful undefended moment — the coach refuses the role of expert-with-an-agenda the client is trying to assign, and does so without sting. Questions emerge from curiosity for the actual phenomenon (the flatness, what happened to it, where the question came from) rather than from a script. There is no improvement-mode language, no filler validation, no rush to insight. The coach matches the client's stillness with stillness (turn 14: 'Yeah. Can you feel the flatness again?'). Impartiality is real, not apathetic — warmth is present in the spareness. Vulnerability is less explicitly named in first-person ('I notice I want to...') which is the one slightly weaker VIEW component, but the undefendedness in turn 12 substitutes adequately.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses framework-comparison bait; goes to the live phenomenon (the smile) with genuine curiosity. One question, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple, open invitation. Pace is slow, no agenda visible."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves to body with a single clean question; not performing technique, following what's alive."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Instruction is gentle and impartial — 'what's it like to just let it be there' is wonder, not directive."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Curiosity about the source of the client's self-judgment; doesn't reassure or fix."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'I'm not pointing at anything' — undefended, refuses the expert role the client tries to assign. Strong VIEW marker."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Matches stillness with stillness. Single 'Yeah' then a quiet question. Holds space without filling it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist"],
  "notes": "Stance is excellent even though some signature questions (what-am-I) haven't yet been asked — that's Methodology Fidelity's concern, not this dimension's. The coach's refusal to be pulled into framework comparison and the 'I'm not pointing at anything' moment are the clearest VIEW signals."
}
